channel.title: Pokemon GO News & Events
channel.description: Official Pokemon GO + GO Hub + LeekDuck

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Dynamax Chansey Max Monday: Event Guide
item.description:
Chansey Max Monday takes place on July 6th, 2026 when Chansey will be appearing in power spots all day. This Max Monday is the first July Pokémon, and it is the very pleasing return of Dynamax Chansey! Chansey’s evolution – Dynamax Blissey – is the undisputed queen of healing! Dynamax Chansey is a type which […]

The post Dynamax Chansey Max Monday: Event Guide appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Events This Week: July 6-12, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s July 6-12 week sees us will into the season of Forever Forward! This is the biggest week of the year in Pokémon GO, with the Road of Legends and global GO Fest taking place! Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Spotlight Hour, Dynamax Battles and Mega Raids. If you play only one week […]

The post Pokémon GO Events This Week: July 6-12, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] ANA and Pokémon GO Partnership: Red Pokémon Jet
item.description:
A new collaboration between Pokémon GO and ANA has been announced! To celebrate the launch of the Red Pokémon Jet—a special project marking Pokémon’s 30th anniversary, with special events being held with ANA at airports across Japan. The following Pokémon will appear in raids:  Trainers can participate in one Raid Battle per day at each […]

The post ANA and Pokémon GO Partnership: Red Pokémon Jet appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] GO Fest 2026: Road of Legends
item.description:
The countdown to Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global begins with Road of Legends, a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final […]

The post GO Fest 2026: Road of Legends appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Niantic Games Team Now Officially Called Scopely Explore
item.description:
Today, 6th July 2026, the Niantic games team officially updates its name to Scopely Explore. As part of the rebrand they intend to debut a new look. They have shared that the Pokémon GO team remains the same, as does their commitment to creating the best gameplay experiences for Trainers everywhere. It has been more […]

The post Niantic Games Team Now Officially Called Scopely Explore appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Road of Legends Day 1: All Five-Star Raids, Rayquaza, Mega Salamence, Bonuses and Guides
item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 1: All Five-Star Raids, Rayquaza, Mega Salamence, Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Happy 10th Anniversary to Pokémon GO!
item.description:
Today Pokémon GO is 10 years old! It was officially released ten years ago on July 6, 2016, and what a decade of adventure it has been. To mark this milestone, Pokémon GO have shared this year’s anniversary artwork from Yusuke Kozaki (@kymg on X), the character designer for Pokémon GO. This artwork references older […]

The post Happy 10th Anniversary to Pokémon GO! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Fest Global: Final Details, Global Challenges and More Revealed
item.description:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global is almost upon us, and Scopely Explore have revealed some final details for the event. Don’t forget, it takes place from Saturday, July 11, to Sunday, July 12, 2026, from 10:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. local time each day! During each hour of the event, Trainers will have a higher chance […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest Global: Final Details, Global Challenges and More Revealed appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Road of Legends Day 2: All Five-Star Raids, Mega Tyranitar, Bonuses and Guides
item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 2: All Five-Star Raids, Mega Tyranitar, Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Nickit Community Day (August 2026)
item.description:
The August 2026 Community Day features the cunning little Nickit, the Fox Pokémon and winner of the Community Choice poll! Join the event on Sunday, August 16, 2026, from 2:00 p.m. to 5:00 p.m. local time to enjoy 3x Catch Stardust, increased Nickit spawns, and a chance to encounter Shiny Nickit. Evolve Nickit during the […]

The post Nickit Community Day (August 2026) appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Special Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Livestream Announced!
item.description:
Trainers, as we close in on the 10th Anniversary of Pokémon GO, the celebrations only seem to be getting more exciting. Aside from all the in-game grandeur, fans worldwide are in for another major surprise, as a special livestream broadcast has been announced for July 9, 2026! However, to add more spice to the thrill, […]

The post Special Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Livestream Announced! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Road of Legends Day 3: All Five-Star Raids, Mega Gardevoir, Bonuses and Guides
item.description:
Road of Legends is a stacked week of Legendary raids, Mega Raids, event bonuses, Special Backgrounds, Adventure Effects, and a new GO Pass. Running from July 6, 2026, at 12:01 a.m. to July 10, 2026, at 11:59 p.m. local time, Road of Legends is a final prep event before GO Fest Global weekend. Trainers will […]

The post Road of Legends Day 3: All Five-Star Raids, Mega Gardevoir, Bonuses and Guides appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.
